title: DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION IN MEDICAL EDUCATION
author: Ergasheva Venera Shukrullayevna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: At the present stage, the integration of media technologies into the digital transformation of education has become a critical issue across all fields. This process represents the integrated interaction of information and communication systems within modern education, which is highly complex and dynamically changing. The study highlights the importance of media tools in enhancing educational efficiency and adapting to new digital realities.
